perItemFindings.label: thm:sharp-ppml-forbidden-sign
perItemFindings.one_line: `WeightedSupport.fwl_identity` only turns a joint WLS minimizer into `thetaHat`; it does not give the needed normal-equation FWL ratio for the IFT derivative. `WeightedSupport.scalar_fwl_of_normalEqs` (ScalarFWL.lean) cleanly supplies that ratio from exactly the weighted score equations and positive residual energy.

verbatim_critique: Re-plan thm:sharp-ppml-forbidden-sign to import and reuse `Causalean.Panel.Weighted.WeightedSupport.scalar_fwl_of_normalEqs` for the Schur/FWL derivative step, replacing `fwl_identity` as its cited reuse. The remaining IFT and PPML-specific work remains define-local.
